Class FileDescriptor

java.lang.Object
io.github.kelsoncm.fwf.descriptors.FileDescriptor
public class FileDescriptor extends Object
Descriptor representing the layout structure of a Fixed Width File.

Contains details, optional header, and optional footer descriptors. Validates that line sizes across all sections are equal.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FileDescriptor(List<DetailRowDescriptor> details)
    Constructs a new FileDescriptor with detail descriptors only.
    FileDescriptor(List<DetailRowDescriptor> details, HeaderRowDescriptor header)
    Constructs a new FileDescriptor with detail and header descriptors.
    FileDescriptor(List<DetailRowDescriptor> details, HeaderRowDescriptor header, FooterRowDescriptor footer)
    Constructs a new FileDescriptor with detail, header, and footer descriptors.

  • Constructor Details

    • FileDescriptor

      public FileDescriptor(List<DetailRowDescriptor> details, HeaderRowDescriptor header, FooterRowDescriptor footer)
      Constructs a new FileDescriptor with detail, header, and footer descriptors.
      Parameters:
      details - list of DetailRowDescriptor instances, must not be empty
      header - optional HeaderRowDescriptor, or null if file has no header
      footer - optional FooterRowDescriptor, or null if file has no footer
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if details is null or empty, or line sizes do not match

    • FileDescriptor

      public FileDescriptor(List<DetailRowDescriptor> details, HeaderRowDescriptor header)
      Constructs a new FileDescriptor with detail and header descriptors.
      Parameters:
      details - list of DetailRowDescriptor instances
      header - optional HeaderRowDescriptor

    • FileDescriptor

      public FileDescriptor(List<DetailRowDescriptor> details)
      Constructs a new FileDescriptor with detail descriptors only.
      Parameters:
      details - list of DetailRowDescriptor instances

  • Method Details

    • getDetails

      public List<DetailRowDescriptor> getDetails()
      Gets the list of detail row descriptors.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable list of detail descriptors

    • getHeader

      public HeaderRowDescriptor getHeader()
      Gets the header row descriptor.
      Returns:
      header descriptor or null if not present

    • getFooter

      public FooterRowDescriptor getFooter()
      Gets the footer row descriptor.
      Returns:
      footer descriptor or null if not present

    • getLineSize

      public int getLineSize()
      Gets the expected line size (in characters) for the file.
      Returns:
      line size in characters
